summary: Admin customers success state displays correctly with proper table data, controls, and mobile responsiveness. Minor visual polish issues present but core functionality and contracts are met.

violations.description: Some text elements appear to use lighter gray colors instead of the specified primary ink color #1f1b18 for high-contrast text
Admin interface uses generic neutral styling that may not be sufficiently separated from public marketing palette system

actions: Verify table data truthfulness matches customer records
Test search and status filter functionality on mobile
Confirm quick actions (suspend/impersonate) are accessible at 390px viewport
Consider applying more distinct admin styling to better separate from public surfaces
